title: Pouteria fabrilis

The Pouteria plant has been found to possess various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may aid in reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and protecting against oxidative stress. The most common herbal preparations made with Pouteria include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions, including fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems.
